================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 D8 2E 04 83 4E
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1865
Reflected CC   : 0x50
RetType        : 0x00
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 33

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1865
ReflectedCC  : 0x50
PayloadLen   : 33

[UNKNOWN MID] No parser for ReflectedMID=0x1865

[PAYLOAD HEX]
EB 2B F0 69 00 46 C3 23 F5 28 5C 3E 5C 8F 02 BF 
CC CC 4C BC 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 
01 

[RETURN VALUE]
EB 2B F0 69 00 46 C3 23 F5 28 5C 3E 5C 8F 02 BF 
CC CC 4C BC 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 
01
